news.paragraph: The market is experiencing downward pressure as rising oil prices and accelerating inflation drive stocks lower. Although some individual components like Nvidia have hit new highs, the Nasdaq and various exchange-traded funds have recently seen declines. Options traders should weigh these macroeconomic headwinds against the current volatility in the index.
